sourceAmbiguity: The request tracker could derive status labels from card-local UI state rather than canonical request truth.
decisionTaken: Each PatientRequestSummaryProjection carries canonicalTruthRef, statusLabel, group, and actionability consumed by row, spotlight, and detail.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The list and detail surfaces share the same truth reference and therefore cannot drift semantically.
operationalRisk: New request states could be added without group mapping.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Extend PatientRequestsIndexProjection group mapping and Playwright row parity assertions together.
